SEARCH
Package wzlib.util

Class WzBinaryReader

java.lang.Object
wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class WzBinaryReader extends Object implements Closeable
Ported from: MapleLib/WzLib/Util/WzBinaryReader.cs Little-endian binary reader with WZ-specific features: - Compressed int/long - Encrypted WZ strings (ASCII + Unicode) - Encrypted offsets - String block reading

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Constructor for file-based reader.

      Throws:

    • rollbackStreamPosition

      public void rollbackStreamPosition(int byOffset) throws IOException
      Rollback stream position by byOffset bytes. Ported from: WzBinaryReader.RollbackStreamPosition(int)
      Throws:
      IOException

    • readOffset

      public long readOffset() throws IOException
      Read encrypted offset. Ported from: WzBinaryReader.ReadOffset() C# code: uint offset = (uint)BaseStream.Position; offset = (offset - Header.FStart) ^ uint.MaxValue; offset *= Hash; offset -= WZ_OffsetConstant; offset = RotateLeft(offset, (byte)(offset invalid input: '&' 0x1F)); uint encryptedOffset = ReadUInt32(); offset ^= encryptedOffset; offset += Header.FStart * 2;
      Throws:
      IOException

    • readStringBlock

      public String readStringBlock(long offset) throws IOException
      Read string block (inline or offset reference). Ported from: WzBinaryReader.ReadStringBlock(long) C#: ReadByte() switch { 0 or 0x73 => ReadString(), 1 or 0x1B => ReadStringAtOffset(offset + ReadInt32()), }
      Throws:
      IOException

    • decryptString

      public String decryptString(String stringToDecrypt)
      Decrypt a List.wz unicode string (no mask). Ported from: WzBinaryReader.DecryptString(ReadOnlySpan)

    • decryptNonUnicodeString

      public String decryptNonUnicodeString(String stringToDecrypt)
      Decrypt a non-unicode string (no mask). Ported from: WzBinaryReader.DecryptNonUnicodeString(ReadOnlySpan)

    • createReaderForSection

      public WzBinaryReader createReaderForSection(long start, int length) throws IOException
      Create a sub-reader for a section of the file (for concurrent reading). Ported from: WzBinaryReader.CreateReaderForSection(long, int)
      Throws:
      IOException
